creator: bbp2006@columbia.edu
text:
I was not aware of this update. However, having quickly inspected it, it 
will break my code, as well as others. I've sent off a message to the 
CPAN owner of the package, but he's on a long vacation.

I'm very uncomfortable approving this patch, but I will keep the port in 
mind as we go forward...

-- 
Brent B. Powers
Manager, Information Technology
Dept of Pathology
Columbia University
